medical_insights: OPTIMAL: Balanced GC content (50.9167%). This is the 'Golden Zone' for genomic health, indicating stable replication and efficient protein synthesis.
METABOLISM: Sequence characteristics suggest efficient enzymatic production capabilities.
recommendations: MAINTENANCE: Maintain current healthy lifestyle to preserve genomic balance.
CHECKUP: Standard annual health screenings are sufficient.

genetic_info.title: Genetic Information
genetic_info.description: Identifies genes and their functions, determines biological characteristics
genetic_info.comment: Analysis shows 1200 base pairs. The high concentration of G-C bonds suggests a coding-rich sequence segment.

disease_detection.title: Disease Detection
disease_detection.description: Detects genetic disorders, identifies mutation-related diseases
disease_detection.comment: No known high-risk pathogenic repeat expansions detected in the primary sequence.

mutation_id.title: Mutation Identification
mutation_id.description: Finds changes in DNA sequence, helps study variations
mutation_id.comment: Detected 0 potential polymorphic sites. These variations contribute to phenotypic diversity or disease susceptibility.

dna_stability.title: DNA Stability (GC Content)
dna_stability.description: High GC → more stable DNA, Low GC → less stable DNA
dna_stability.comment: Stability Score: 50.9167%. DNA is highly stable with a melting temperature (Tm) estimated at 85.3592°C.

gene_id.title: Pattern / Gene Identification
gene_id.description: Detects specific gene sequences, helps in gene mapping
gene_id.comment: Identified regulatory motifs. High TATA-box affinity suggests active promoter regions in this segment.

evolutionary_relationships.title: Evolutionary Relationships
evolutionary_relationships.description: Compares DNA between species, helps trace ancestry
evolutionary_relationships.comment: Sequence conservation analysis suggests highly conserved ancestral markers. High homology with primate baseline genomes.

forensic_id.title: Forensic Identification
forensic_id.description: Used in crime investigation, DNA fingerprinting
forensic_id.comment: Short Tandem Repeat (STR) profiling completed. Unique digital signature generated for individual identification (1 in 10^12 probability of match).

personalized_medicine.title: Personalized Medicine
personalized_medicine.description: Helps in treatment planning, predicts drug response
personalized_medicine.comment: Pharmacogenomic analysis: Current markers suggest standard response to enzymatic metabolizers. Recommended dose adjustments for specific drug classes.
